'''Kile Hannad''' was a [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Royal Guard]] who survived the aftermath of the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor's]] defeat at [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] and [[Death/Legends|death]] on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]].

==Biography==
When the guardsmen met at [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]] and decided to avenge [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] by killing the traitor [[Carnor Jax]], they were attacked almost immediately by a swarm of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. Although the guardsmen fought ferociously, killing dozens of stormtroopers, they were eventually overwhelmed until only two remained: Kile Hannad and [[Kir Kanos]]. With the flip of a coin, Hannad stayed to fight while Kanos escaped. Hannad's sacrifice allowed Kanos the chance to exact revenge against Jax.

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Crimson Empire (audio drama)|audio dramatization]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Crimson Empire]]'' series, Kile Hannad is portrayed as the Royal Guard who was with Palpatine on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] and brought news of [[Carnor Jax]]'s betrayal to his brothers on Yinchorr. However, [[Crimson Empire 3|''Crimson Empire'' 3]] portrays the survivor of Onderon as a [[Unidentified Royal Guard (Onderon)|separate character]], who is killed during the ambush on Yinchorr before Hannad.
